arts.ttl: Adam Sells’ talking points from Crystal Palace’s 0-0 draw at Bournemouth - signing attacking talent a priority in transfer window
arts.sum: One in three is a good target in terms of shutouts and from 18 games, the Eagles are a couple short in that respect. Crystal Palace drew 0-0 at Bournemouth on Boxing Day. Here are Adam Sells’ talking points from the Premier League stalemate.

arts.ttl: Director reveals Southampton player ‘still on list’ after summer failure – Admits January deal ‘possible’
arts.sum: Ajax have Southampton’s Kamaldeen Sulemana on their target list after a failed move in the summer window. That’s according to Ajax technical director Alex Kroes, and he revealed this during a chat with Het Parool. The Eredivisie side had agreed a deal with Southampton to take the winger on a loan deal late in the The post Director reveals Southampton player ‘still on list’ after summer failure – Admits January deal ‘possible’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Southampton predictions: Eagles can soar against struggling Saints
arts.sum: Crystal Palace picked up a solid away point at Bournemouth on Boxing Day and Phil Agius is backing them to build on that with a home win against bottom side Southampton on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Matchday Warm-up: Who's played for both Palace & Southampton?
arts.sum: Crystal Palace host Southampton at Selhurst Park this Sunday (29th December, 15:00 GMT) – but how many players to have represented both clubs since the year 2000 can you recall?
